programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Game of Cat and Mouse: Crime drama with Candace Cameron Bure. When a mysterious criminal taunts Aurora by leaving clues at crime scenes, she must win the final round before it's too late! (2019)
A woman discovers that her teenage daughter's older boyfriend has a a deadly history with herself. Starring Clare Kramer. (2019)
Tangled thriller with Jeri Ryan. An eco-fashion designer's big debut hits a snag when her employee turns up dead. With secrets unravelling, can she stitch together the truth before she's next (2010)?
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...The Julius House: Lawrenceton's most dedicated sleuth has found her dream home. But only Aurora would buy a house that used to be a crime scene... (2016)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...The Julius House: Lawrenceton's most dedicated sleuth has found her dream home. But only Aurora would buy a house that used to be a crime scene... (2016)
Never the Bride: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
Resurrection: Castle returns to the precinct as a police consultant, but he's not the only person who's back! 3XK is on the loose and it's up to Castle and Beckett to put him away for good.
...Deceit: Thriller with Jesse Metcalfe. A missing family heirloom is the key to finding the truth as former detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr Zee Madieras to track down a murderer. (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Deceit: Thriller with Jesse Metcalfe. A missing family heirloom is the key to finding the truth as former detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr Zee Madieras to track down a murderer. (2020)
Murder Two: Part 1: Dr Sloan requests the help of his old friend Ben Matlock when a malpractice suit sees Jesse become the prime suspect in a murder investigation.
Murder Two: Part 2: Dr Sloan and Ben Matlock continue to investigate the case which saw Jesse arrested for murder. Can they unearth fresh evidence that will prove his innocence? Part 2 of 2.
Twice Dead: Jessica investigates the murder of a Nobel Prize winning physicist, a man who was already believed to be dead.
Film Flam: Is history repeating itself when the special screening of a 1960's movie is marred by tragedy?
Diplomatic Immunity: Bobby investigates a Sudanese diplomat after he witnesses him attacking a woman. Risking his career, Bobby is undeterred and unearths a sickening crime ring.
Reckoning: In the thrilling conclusion to this two-part story, the stakes are at an all-time high as Castle and the precinct race to stop Beckett becoming serial killer 3XK's next victim.
Golden Bird: Carrie and Al attempt to solve the senseless murder of a teenager who, on the surface, does not appear to have any enemies.
Trojan Horst: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
... Last Breath: Mystery drama starring Taylor Cole. When a fatal car crash raises red flags, a determined TV reporter and a seasoned detective join forces to uncover the truth. (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Psychological thriller with Morgan Bradley. A new mother's world unravels when she suspects someone is trying to steal her baby - is it real or a dangerous figment of her sleep-deprived mind? (2021)
Twisted mystery starring Megan Park. A grieving young woman is accused of the murder of both her parents. Can she and her friends prove her innocence in the disturbing case (2018)?

...Dead Over Heels: Murder hits close to home for librarian and crime buff Aurora when she gets involved in the death of a local detective. (2017)

Trojan Horst: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
Reckoning: In the thrilling conclusion to this two-part story, the stakes are at an all-time high as Castle and the precinct race to stop Beckett becoming serial killer 3XK's next victim.
Mystery starring Jill Wagner. When a rising star receives a chilling death threat, a quick-thinking professor steps into the spotlight to uncover the truth. (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Mystery starring Jill Wagner. When a rising star receives a chilling death threat, a quick-thinking professor steps into the spotlight to uncover the truth. (2019)
Hard-Boiled Murder: Dr Sloan helps his old friend, Private Detective Joe Maddix, investigate an unsolved murder case from 1973.
Murder, Country Style: Dr Sloan investigates the murder of a country music star whose body is discovered moments before he is due to accept an award.
Murder A La Mode: Jessica travels to Paris to promote her new book. Is a fashion designer's murder linked to a tragic 'sweatshop' fire?
The Dream Team: Gossip spreads through Cabot Cove when developers announce plans for a new resort complex in the local area. Meanwhile, Jessica investigates a fatal car accident.
Dirty Bomb: Sue's exceptional ability to read people's lips exposes the prospect of a terrorist bomb plot.
The Wrong Stuff: When an astronaut is mysteriously killed during a simulated mission to Mars, Castle and Beckett spacesuit-up and investigate.
Trajectories: Carrie and Al investigate what appears to be a gang related shooting.
Who Shot Jay Arnstein?: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
...Drink and Be Buried: Crime sequel starring Dylan Neal. Culinary whiz Harry is hired to work a summer gala, but soon finds himself caught up in a murder mystery. Also starring Brooke Burns. (2017)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Drink and Be Buried: Crime sequel starring Dylan Neal. Culinary whiz Harry is hired to work a summer gala, but soon finds himself caught up in a murder mystery. Also starring Brooke Burns. (2017)
...Very Foul Play: Fiction becomes reality for super sleuth Aurora when she appears in a murder mystery play, only for the stage to become an actual crime scene... (2019)
